name: mescc-aarch64
smoke: === MesCC-aarch64: compile + run C programs natively on aarch64 ===   int main(){return 42;}             -> 42   ok   int main(){return 2+3*4;}          -> 14   ok   int main(){return (10-4)*2;}       -> 12   ok   int main(){return 7*6;}            -> 42   ok   int main(){return 1+2+3+4+5;}      -> 15   ok   int main(){return 100-58;}         -> 42   ok   int main(){return 2*3*7;}          -> 42
